allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(security\): audit fixes — XSS, CORS, auth secret, memory leaks, race conditions

CRITICAL:
- Escape user data in innerHTML to prevent XSS \(main-entry.js\)
- CORS origin whitelisting via ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var \(auth, layers, lib/auth\)
- Auth secret throws in production if BETTER_AUTH_SECRET is missing
- Remove error.message leak from auth 500 response

MAJOR:
- Fix memory leak: AbortController cleans up document listeners on re-render
- Fix uncancellable auth refresh interval accumulation
- Remove duplicate verifyAuth call in sketches API
- Atomic sketch lock acquisition \(single UPDATE instead of SELECT+UPDATE\)
- Fix updateUser silently clearing organization when field is omitted

MINOR:
- Replace silent catch blocks with console.warn
- Change console.log to console.debug across all API routes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
